goal: Generate a square 1:1 card image showing a dark charcoal compact SUV on International Drive Orlando at blue hour dusk — I-Drive entertainment strip illuminated in warm amber-orange behind, no people, must read 'urban Orlando evening energy' at card size.

creative_direction.core_idea: SUV en I-Drive al dusk — la semana Epic Universe / entretenimiento nocturno Orlando
creative_direction.visual_thesis: Blue hour I-Drive con el SUV: urban Florida vacation energy, no suburban

composition.shot_type: 3/4 front editorial — slightly dynamic, as if vehicle just pulled up
composition.layout: Dark SUV dominates the lower 60% of frame; I-Drive illuminated commercial strip fills the upper background; blue-purple dusk sky caps the top

camera.framing: 1:1 square — vehicle sharp against illuminated I-Drive background
camera.angle: 3/4 front, slightly low — dynamic forward lean implied
camera.depth_of_field: vehicle tack sharp, I-Drive lights in background pleasantly blurred into warm bokeh

overlay_compatibility.text_safe_zone: upper left — dark blue-purple dusk sky, minimum light pollution
overlay_compatibility.logo_safe_zone: lower right — dark pavement area below vehicle

subject.model_reference: Honda CR-V 2023 or Kia Sportage 2023 style — dark charcoal or slate gray exterior
critical_attributes: dark charcoal or slate gray — not black, not white
headlights on — ambient DRL glow gives life to the vehicle at dusk
no rental company logos or stickers
modern compact SUV silhouette — not a sedan, not a truck

scene.location: International Drive, Orlando, FL — commercial entertainment boulevard, I-Drive district
scene.time_of_day: blue hour — 20-30 minutes after sunset, sky is deep blue-purple, artificial lights dominate
environment: I-Drive commercial strip illuminated in warm amber and orange artificial lights
Palm trees along boulevard — lit from below by orange uplighting
Commercial architecture visible — entertainment zone, restaurant signs as soft bokeh
Wet pavement optional — adds warm orange light reflections
scene.background_view: I-Drive entertainment strip — warm amber bokeh lights, lit palms, blue-purple sky
critical_scene_rules: No readable Universal, Epic Universe, or specific venue logos
Sky must be distinctly blue hour — not full night, not golden hour
I-Drive warm amber lights must contrast with dark vehicle and blue sky — this is the visual tension

lighting.type: blue hour mixed lighting — cool sky vs warm artificial I-Drive lights
effects: vehicle lit by warm I-Drive ambient — charcoal paint picks up amber-orange tones
headlights on — adds depth and presence to vehicle at dusk
background bokeh: warm amber orbs from commercial strip lights
sky: blue-indigo gradient, no stars yet
optional wet pavement reflection of warm I-Drive lights

dominant: dark charcoal vehicle — absorbs and reflects warm ambient
accent: palm tree silhouettes lit orange from below
vehicle DRL headlight glow — cool white
rules: Warm vs cool contrast is the visual heart: amber I-Drive lights vs blue dusk sky
Dark vehicle acts as the neutral bridge between warm and cool
No bright white or pure black — charcoal vehicle in mixed light is the target
Background bokeh must feel like entertainment district, not suburban highway

negative_prompt: no full night darkness — blue hour only
no suburban context — I-Drive commercial only
master_prompt: Create a square 1:1 editorial image at 2048x2048 pixels for a car rental marketplace showing a dark charcoal compact SUV — Honda CR-V or Kia Sportage 2023 style — positioned on International Drive in Orlando, Florida, at blue hour dusk. The vehicle is shot from a 3/4 front angle slightly low with a 50mm lens, giving a natural dynamic forward energy. Headlights are on with a cool DRL glow. The I-Drive commercial entertainment strip fills the background with warm amber and orange bokeh lights from restaurants and entertainment venues — no readable specific logos. Palm trees are visible along the boulevard, lit from below with orange uplighting. The sky above is a deep blue-indigo dusk gradient — 20 minutes after sunset, no stars, not fully dark. The dark charcoal vehicle catches warm amber reflections from the I-Drive ambient on its body panels, creating a compelling warm-cool tension: cool blue sky overhead, warm orange I-Drive behind, dark vehicle in between. No people, no passengers. Optional: light wet pavement reflection of the warm commercial lights. The image must read as 'urban Orlando entertainment district evening — this is the vehicle for a week of Epic Universe and I-Drive dining' at card size. Avoid daytime, full night, beach, mountains, convertibles, sports cars, readable venue branding, rental logos, and any text or watermarks.
